meaning: 全息电影系统;n.西涅拉玛型立体声宽银幕电影,全景电影
examples: The future of cinema hums softly in a dark projection room in Hollywood's modernized old Cinerama Dome.
At that time, even when "2001" first came out, there were only about 55 or 60 Cinerama theaters in the world.
The boxes, named and decorated for flowers, had been sheared off the walls in the 1940s during the theater's movie-house phase as Cinerama.
